info.name: Full Traceability System API
info.description:
Comprehensive API testing collection for the ThinkOnErp Full Traceability System. This collection covers all endpoints for audit logging, compliance reporting, performance monitoring, security monitoring, and alert management.

## Features
- Complete audit log querying and management
- GDPR, SOX, and ISO 27001 compliance reports
- System health and performance monitoring
- Security threat detection and monitoring
- Alert rule management and notification testing

## Authentication
All endpoints require JWT authentication. Use the Auth > Login endpoint to obtain a token, which will be automatically set in the collection variables.

## Environment Variables
- `baseUrl`: API base URL (default: http://localhost:5000)
- `token`: JWT access token (auto-populated after login)
- `refreshToken`: JWT refresh token (auto-populated after login)

item.name: Authentication
item.description: Authentication endpoints for obtaining JWT tokens

request.description: Login with admin credentials to obtain JWT token for accessing protected endpoints
Refresh the JWT token using the refresh token

item.name: Audit Logs
item.description: Endpoints for querying and managing audit logs with legacy compatibility

query.description: Filter by business module (POS, HR, Accounting, etc.)
Filter by status (Unresolved, In Progress, Resolved, Critical)
Search term for description, user, device, or error code

request.description: Retrieve audit logs in legacy format compatible with logs.png interface. Returns error descriptions, modules, companies, branches, users, devices, timestamps, and status.
Get dashboard counters showing: Unresolved count, In Progress count, Resolved count, and Critical Errors count
Update the status of an audit log entry for error resolution workflow. Status values: Unresolved, In Progress, Resolved, Critical
Get the current status of a specific audit log entry
Get all audit log entries associated with a specific correlation ID for request tracing
Get complete audit history for a specific entity (all INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE operations)
Get chronological sequence of all actions performed by a user for debugging and analysis
Full-text search across audit log entries
Export audit logs to CSV format based on filter criteria
Export audit logs to JSON format based on filter criteria

item.name: Compliance Reports
item.description: Endpoints for generating GDPR, SOX, and ISO 27001 compliance reports

query.description: User ID of the data subject

request.description: Generate GDPR data access report showing all access to personal data (Article 15 compliance)
Generate GDPR access report in PDF format

query.description: User ID of the data subject

request.description: Generate GDPR data export report with complete personal data (Article 20 compliance)
Generate SOX financial data access report (Section 404 compliance)
Generate SOX segregation of duties report identifying potential violations
Generate ISO 27001 security event report (Annex A.12.4 compliance)
Generate chronological report of all user actions
Generate complete audit trail of all modifications to a specific entity

item.name: Monitoring
item.description: System health, performance, memory, and security monitoring endpoints

request.description: Get comprehensive system health metrics including CPU, memory, database connections, request rate, and error rate. This endpoint is publicly accessible for health checks.

query.description: Endpoint path to get statistics for

request.description: Get performance statistics for a specific endpoint including request count, average/min/max execution time, and percentiles (p50, p95, p99)
Get requests that exceeded the specified execution time threshold
Get database queries that exceeded the specified execution time threshold
Get detailed Oracle connection pool metrics including active/idle connections, pool size, and utilization
Get the current audit queue depth and utilization percentage
Get comprehensive audit logging system metrics including queue depth, circuit breaker state, success/failure rates, and pending fallback files
Get detailed memory usage metrics including heap sizes, GC statistics, and allocation rate
Detect current memory pressure level and get recommendations
Get memory optimization recommendations based on current usage patterns
Trigger memory optimization strategies including garbage collection and heap compaction. WARNING: This can temporarily impact performance.

query.description: Wait for GC to complete. Default: true

request.description: Force garbage collection for a specific generation. WARNING: Can impact performance.

item.name: Security Monitoring
item.description: Security threat detection and monitoring endpoints

request.description: Get all active security threats including failed login patterns, unauthorized access, SQL injection, XSS, and anomalous activity
Generate daily security summary report including threat counts, top sources, and trend analysis
Check if an IP address has exceeded the failed login threshold
Get the count of failed login attempts for a specific user
Scan input text for SQL injection patterns
Scan input text for XSS (Cross-Site Scripting) patterns
Detect anomalous activity for a specific user (unusual request volumes, timing, or geographic patterns)

item.name: Alerts
item.description: Alert rule management, alert history, and notification testing endpoints

request.description: Get all configured alert rules with pagination

body.raw:
{
  "name": "High Error Rate Alert",
  "description": "Alert when error rate exceeds 5% in 5 minutes",
  "eventType": "Exception",
  "severityThreshold": "Error",
  "condition": {
    "metric": "ErrorRate",
    "operator": "GreaterThan",
    "threshold": 5,
    "windowMinutes": 5
  },
  "notificationChannels": "Email,Webhook",
  "emailRecipients": ["admin@example.com", "ops@example.com"],
  "webhookUrl": "https://hooks.slack.com/services/YOUR/WEBHOOK/URL",
  "smsRecipients": null
}

request.description: Create a new alert rule with conditions, thresholds, and notification settings
Update an existing alert rule
Delete an alert rule
Get historical alerts with acknowledgment and resolution status
Acknowledge an alert to indicate it has been reviewed
Resolve an alert with resolution notes
Send a test email alert to verify email configuration
Send a test webhook alert to verify webhook configuration
Send a test SMS alert to verify SMS configuration (E.164 format)
